name: spec-kit-042-inventory-modernization-context-pack

goals: FR-001: Existing reservation APIs MUST remain backward compatible.
FR-002: Migration notes MUST identify any manual compatibility checks.
non_goals: Do not vendor or fork GitHub Spec Kit.
Do not require Spec Kit for normal ae-framework usage.
Do not treat report-only bridge findings as merge approval.

terms.ja: Spec Kit 取込フィーチャ
Spec Kit 連携ブリッジ
terms.note: Report-only mapping into Context Pack and ExecPlan v2 references.

pre: Spec Kit feature directory is readable.
post: Requirement, plan, task, contract, and verification references are preserved as report-only assurance inputs.

pre: Existing reservation acceptance tests continue to pass after modernization.
post: Given an existing reservation workflow, When the internal implementation is modernized, Then external approval behavior remains unchanged.

diagrams.statement: Spec Kit spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, and contracts/* are imported into Context Pack and ExecPlan v2 without replacing their source artifacts.

acceptance_tests.scenario: Existing reservation APIs MUST remain backward compatible.
expected: SC-001: Compatibility evidence is attached before merge judgment.

acceptance_tests.scenario: Migration notes MUST identify any manual compatibility checks.
expected: SC-001: Compatibility evidence is attached before merge judgment.
Given an existing reservation workflow, When the internal implementation is modernized, Then external approval behavior remains unchanged.

forbidden_changes: Do not vendor or fork GitHub Spec Kit inside ae-framework.
Do not promote bridge findings from report-only to blocking without a separate policy issue.
Do not drop source Spec Kit artifact paths when rendering assurance evidence.
